title: Product Truth Ownership
purpose: Register the already-established Product Truth owner without creating new authority.
scope:
- Concept: Product Truth.
- Owner: Product Intelligence.
- Consumers: bounded product consumers.
responsibilities:
- Preserve provenance and effective period.
- Prevent local duplicate truth.
authority:
- Owner-establishing authority: ADR-005.
- Registration authority: SG-001 and SG-002.
boundaries:
- Registration only.
- Consumers may not redefine official truth.
- Unknown remains blocked.
dependencies:
- Product source evidence.
- RuleSnapshot when applicable.
- Provenance chain.
source_of_truth:
- Canonical source: approved product source pack.
- Conceptual owner: Product Intelligence.
- Evidence state: verified or blocked.
related_documents:
- Source of Truth index.
- Product Intelligence responsibility.
constitutional_references:
- Article 0 / Ley Zero.
- Articles II, III, V, VII and IX.
traceability:
- Template: Canonical Source of Truth Scaffold.
- Gate: SG-002 allowlisted owner registration.
